case_title: DONALD ROBERTS VS. MN BEST BUY CO. INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-12-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MN BEST BUY CO. INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-23-2019 BY DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF DONALD ROBERTS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MN BEST BUY CO., INC., REPRESENTED BY JOSE ESPINOZA, FIELD MANAGER AND JASON LISBY, HOME SERVICE SENIOR MANAGER IS PRESENT. PARTIES AGREE TO MEDIATION AND ARE RELEASED FOR MEDIATION PROCEEDING AT 3:35 P.M. AFTER ALL PARTIES ARE SWORN IN. PARTIES ARE UNABLE TO REACH A SETTLEMENT AND THE MATTER IS HEARD. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBERTS, DONALD ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBERTS, DONALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MN BEST BUY CO. INC. $799.97 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $799.97 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JASON LISBY, HOME SERVICES SENIOR MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT MN BEST BUY CO. INC.
ORDER AND STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOSE ESPINOZA, BEST BUY REPRESENTATION LOCAL MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT MN BEST BUY CO. INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,441.52 FILED BY ROBERTS, DONALD AS TO DEFENDANT MN BEST BUY CO. INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2019 - JUDGMENT.
